title: U.S. sends thousands more troops to Mideast as Trump seeks to squeeze Iran
summary_full: The deployment includes sailors and Marines due to arrive as the administration attempts to enforce a maritime blockade against the regime in Tehran.
summary_public: The deployment includes sailors and Marines due to arrive as the administration attempts to enforce a maritime blockade against the regime in Tehran.
